commands.review_summary:
The PR adds SANs to auto-generated gateway self-signed certificates plus a helper and tests intended to upgrade existing CN-only generated certs.

PR surface: Source +56, Tests +80. Total +136 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main and v2026.6.10 generate CN-only gateway certificates, and Node v24 checkServerIdentity requires IP SAN entries for IP hostnames. I did not run a full gateway handshake in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This PR needs author code changes, fresh contributor-side real behavior proof, and maintainer TLS identity/upgrade-scope judgment before merge; automation should not proceed while proof is insufficient.

target.title: fix(tls): add subjectAltName to auto-generated gateway self-signed certificate (fixes #96910)
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #96910.

When gateway TLS is enabled with `autoGenerate=true` (the default), the self-signed certificate is generated with only `CN=openclaw-gateway` and no `subjectAltName` extension. Node.js ≥17 ignores the CN for hostname/IP verification per RFC 6125, so the CLI probe to `wss://127.0.0.1:18789` fails.

## Why This Change Was Made

- New certs: added `-addext subjectAltName=...` to the openssl command
- Existing certs: auto-detect CN-only certs and regenerate with SANs
- Regeneration is **transactional**: old files renamed to `.bak`, restored on failure

## Changes Made

- `src/infra/tls/gateway.ts`: Added SAN extension, CN-only detection, transactional upgrade with backup/rollback
- `src/infra/tls/gateway.test.ts`: Added regression tests for upgrade and fresh generation

## Evidence

- **Unit tests:** `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/infra/tls/gateway.test.ts` — 9/9 passed

## Real behavior proof

**New cert:**
```
$ openssl x509 -in gateway-cert.pem -noout -ext subjectAltName
X509v3 Subject Alternative Name:
    DNS:localhost, DNS:<hostname>, IP Address:127.0.0.1, IP Address:0:0:0:0:0:0:0:1

$ tls.checkServerIdentity('127.0.0.1', cert)
✅ PASSED for 127.0.0.1
```

**Upgrade path (existing CN-only cert):**
```
[warn] gateway tls: upgrading CN-only certificate to include subjectAltName
[info] gateway tls: generated self-signed cert at ...

BEFORE: CN=openclaw-gateway, no SAN
AFTER:  CN=openclaw-gateway, SAN=DNS:localhost,...,IP:127.0.0.1
```

**Transactional safety:**
```
Old cert → renamed to .bak
New cert generated
  Success → .bak removed
  Failure → .bak restored, original cert preserved
```

- [x] AI-assisted
